sources.api: api-onepiece.com v2 (machine-translated French; mirrored to data/raw/)
sources.wiki: One Piece Fandom, CC-BY-SA 3.0 — structured facts only, no prose

warnings: 4 characters debut at 'Chapter 0'/'Episode 0' upstream (indigo, seagull-guns-nozdon, shiki, taro) — the Strong World one-shot and cover-story walk-ons. Chapter 0 is not a point on the 1..N axis this app fogs against, so their debut is recorded as unknown rather than as 'before chapter 1'.
94 episodes fall in no canon arc segment (filler between arcs, plus the Uta/Film Red tie-ins 1029/1030). This is correct: the gaps between episode_segments ARE filler.
crew_joins contains UNVERIFIED rows. Shawn has not confirmed them against the manga. The UI must render them as unverified and no content ships on them.
voyage_legs contains UNVERIFIED waypoints. Route chapter stamps are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render the route as unverified.
vessels contains UNVERIFIED rows. Ship-acquisition chapters are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render them as unverified.
crew_presence contains UNVERIFIED windows. Who-is-where chapter stamps are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render presence as unverified.
statuses contains UNVERIFIED windows. Warlord/Emperor/Supernova reveal chapters are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render them as unverified.
poneglyphs contains UNVERIFIED custody windows (7 stones, 3 of them Road Poneglyphs). Reveal chapters are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render them as unverified.
events contains UNVERIFIED rows (10 events). Occurrence chapters are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render events as unverified.
fruit_reveals contains UNVERIFIED rows. Fruit reveal chapters are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render fruit facts as unverified.
haki_users contains UNVERIFIED rows. Haki reveal chapters are not manga-confirmed. The UI must render haki facts as unverified.

124 bounty rows were dropped for carrying no reveal chapter (databook, Vivre Card and magazine figures the wiki never ties to a chapter). An ungated bounty cannot be fogged, so it is dropped rather than shown from chapter 1. To restore one, give it a chapter in canon/bounties.json.

islands.name: Thriller Bark
islands.source_ref: Hand-authored. The wiki files Thriller Bark as a ship, not an island, so scripts/sync_wiki.py never saw it — it walks the island category. It is the largest ship ever built and it drifts in the Florian Triangle; the crew treats it as land for an entire arc, and so does this map. Debut ch. 442. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga. | position: Hand-authored. Thriller Bark is a SHIP adrift in the Florian Triangle, so it has no fixed position at all — this places it beside the Florian Triangle pin (-58.3636, -0.666), between Enies Lobby and Sabaody on the voyage. A guess, and marked as one: the honest answer to 'where is it' is 'moving'.

crews.name: Crescent Moon Crew
crews.raw_name: The crew of the Moon Crescent

fruits.name: Gum-Gum Fruit
fruits.description: Gomu Gomu no Mi, also known as the Fruit of Gum-Gum in French, is a Paramecia-type Demon Fruit that imparts the same properties as rubber to its user's body, making the eater an Elastic Man (ゴム人間, Gomu Ningen). This was once a treasure that Shanks and his crew had taken from a World Government convoy, protected by CP9, but which was accidentally eaten by Monkey D. Luffy

fruits.name: Fruit of Fragmentation
fruits.description: Allows you to separate your body into several parts and levitate them. The parts can fly in an area 200 meters in diameter around the feet. The feet, on the other hand, cannot levitate (although they can walk). This power makes the user immune to sharp weapons. Any part of the user will nevertheless remain sensitive to the pain felt by other detached body parts.

fruits.name: Fruit Glisse-Glisse
fruits.description: Smoothes the user's skin, making it more beautiful. What's more, the skin becomes ultra-slick, deflecting objects touching the body.

fruits.name: Kilo-Kilo Fruit
fruits.description: Allows the user's mass to be varied between a featherweight and 10 tons. Note that the user's volume does not change when he changes his mass.

fruits.name: Fruit Boum-Boum
fruits.description: The user can make any part of his body explode, including his boogers and breath, rendering him insensitive to explosions. The user can combine his power with a pistol, which he reloads by blowing into it.

fruits.name: Fruit Des Éclosions
fruits.description: Allows the user to grow body parts (or even clones) anywhere, even on another person. He can assemble several copies of the same limb to create, for example, giant hands, or create clones of himself to deceive opponents.

fruits.name: Ciro-Fruit
fruits.description: Produces a fast-hardening wax that can be molded into any shape. This wax becomes very resistant when hardened, but remains just as vulnerable to heat as normal wax. Note that it can block most poisons.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Glutton
fruits.description: Allows its user to eat anything and integrate this food into his own body. For example, if he eats a cannon, his tongue can transform into a real cannon. It can also fuse together the beings it has eaten, and self-ingest to slim down.

fruits.name: Travesti-Fruit
fruits.description: Allows you to change your appearance by touching your face with your right hand, and to return to your normal appearance by touching your face with your left hand. You only need to touch a person once for their appearance to be remembered forever. The user can also assemble parts of different people, but is unable to attack unless he possesses his own face and body.

fruits.name: Sea Urchin Fruit
fruits.description: Allows you to transform any part of your body (even your hair) into spikes strong enough to pierce stone walls. These spikes can also be used to perform acupuncture techniques to increase the user's own muscle mass.

fruits.name: Slashing Fruit
fruits.description: Allows you to transform parts of your body into sharp steel. Its owner can, for example, transform his body into sharp blades to protect him, or his arms into sharp blades.

fruits.name: Fruit du Séquestre
fruits.description: Enables the user to imprison opponents by coming into contact with them. These constrictive bonds are made of a rapidly hardening substance.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Spring
fruits.description: Transform parts of your body into springs that bounce back at impressive speed, increasing the power of your blows.

fruits.name: Fruit du Fil
fruits.description: Allows you to take control of someone and use them as a puppet, as well as to easily cut people and objects of various sizes in a large area. It also enables its user to cling to clouds to 'fly', to link several wires together to create a sharp whip, and in a 'combined' version in ball form to 'fire' wire bullets like a pistol shot. And last but not least, he can create a clone from strings that has the same abilities as its owner, and this clone is impervious to bladed weapons. Thanks to his fruit, the user can administer first aid by stitching up organs and open wounds.

fruits.name: Ramollo fruit
fruits.description: Emits a ray that slows down the movement of any mass for 30 seconds. This ray can be reflected by a mirror, and the user is not immune to its effects.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Porter
fruits.description: Allows the user to transform anything he touches into a door: a wall, part of a human body or a vacuum. In the latter case, the user 'disappears' into another dimension and can go anywhere by opening a door at a specific point.

fruits.name: Fruit des Bulles
fruits.description: Allows its possessor to produce soap bubbles that clean everything to the point of removing the force itself. It also soaps the skin, making enemies so slippery they can barely move or hold anything in their hands.

fruits.name: Berry Fruit
fruits.description: Enables its user to divide his body into berry-like parts and thus bounce off any surface. It is therefore immune to punches and blunt weapons.

fruits.name: Rust fruit
fruits.description: Enables its owner to rust anything he touches. It can therefore rust any bladed weapon or living creature's limbs.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Wheels
fruits.description: Allows its owner to transform body parts into wheels and spin them at high speed.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Resurrection
fruits.description: Allows the owner to come back to life after death (this power only works once). Its possessor can take his soul out of his body, take it through walls and return it to his body as he wishes. Similarly, if his head is cut off, his fruit enables him to bring it back to his shoulders by sheer force of will (the soul is still connected to his body). If his power is combined with a sword, he can freeze any enemy he touches, thanks to the icy cold of the depths that his soul brings to his sword.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Shadow
fruits.description: Allows its user to control shadows. He can cut the shadows of anyone with a pair of scissors, and the shadows thus removed can be locked into inert bodies, giving rise to zombies possessing the combat techniques of the person to whom the shadow belonged. If shadows are enclosed in the body of a living being, they can only remain for a short time, depending on the latter's mental strength. For example, its user has consumed up to 1000 of them. It should also be noted that the user can use his own shadow and make it tangible. He can therefore use his shadow to teleport or protect himself from physical attacks.

fruits.name: Fruit of Ectoplasm
fruits.description: Allows its user to create ghosts with various abilities, such as undermining morale or exploding. It also allows its user to make himself intangible: the user can float in the air and pass through walls, but has the great disadvantage of leaving his inert body defenseless.

fruits.name: Fruit of Invisibility
fruits.description: Enables the user to make himself and everything he touches (living beings, firearms, etc.) invisible.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Pads
fruits.description: Thanks to the pads held in the hands, the user can project powerful shockwaves, teleport or repel anything and everything, including pain and physical attacks. The user can 'dispatch' opponents anywhere.

fruits.name: Magnéto-Fruit
fruits.description: Allows the user to manipulate magnetic forces, attracting metals to him or her but also repelling them. It can also create a metal golem when a large quantity is gathered.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Scalpel
fruits.description: This fruit allows the eater to create a sphere in which he can do anything from interchanging one thing with another to extending the range of his sword strokes. It can also cut up its victims without killing them, or cancel the gravity of anything in the sphere. Its user can even remove a person's heart while leaving them alive, or swap the personalities of several people. This fruit is considered the "ultimate demon fruit" because of its unique ability to grant another person eternal youth in exchange for the user's life.

fruits.name: Fruit du Château
fruits.description: Allows the user to become a man-castle, with the following special features: anyone within a certain range of him (marked by a red zone) is miniaturized, and anyone who comes out is restored to normal size; the holder can create loopholes in his body to enable the besieged to "defend the fortress". The user's interior is made up of different rooms where members can live. The user can also miniaturize himself to join his guests, but leaves his physical body inert. He can replace his legs with a system of caterpillar tracks to move around more easily, or transform himself into a sort of armed, fortified golem that can serve as a refuge for his allies.

fruits.name: Fruit de la Paille
fruits.description: Allows the user to produce and manipulate straw at will. It can also be used to redirect damage.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Sound
fruits.description: Enables the user to transform body parts into instruments and use them as weapons.

fruits.name: Passion fruit
fruits.description: Allows its possessor to use love as a lethal weapon through a variety of means. These techniques are designed to petrify people or objects, and are all heart-shaped (rays, piercing kisses, kicks, etc.). This power only works on people with an attraction (however slight) for the user. When the user reverses the process, the victim has no memory of the time spent petrified.

fruits.name: Poison Fruit
fruits.description: Allows its user to secrete a panoply of poisons and toxic gases. The effects of these venoms change according to the user's needs. Users can shape their creations in any way they like, and can even cover their entire body with poison to protect themselves.

fruits.name: Fruit of Hormones
fruits.description: Allows its user to secrete hormones and inject them into himself or someone else. These hormones can modify the body of the person to whom they are injected: for example, their sex can be changed. They can also heal, revitalize (adrenalin) or enlarge a body part.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Scissors
fruits.description: Allows users to transform their hands into scissors that cut absolutely anything, from sheets of paper to brick walls. Any cut material can be handled with ease.

fruits.name: Fruit of Trembling
fruits.description: Enables the user to create seismic waves, causing earthquakes or cracks (even in the surrounding air) that destroy anything within their zone of effect. The strength of these waves varies according to the user's desire, and they can be disproportionately large. The power of this fruit is so great that it can also cause tsunamis or abysses. Seismic waves can cover weapons to increase the power of their blows tenfold.

fruits.name: Sparkling Fruit
fruits.description: Enables the user to transform his body into a diamond. It then possesses extraordinary resistance.

fruits.name: Fruit de la Poche
fruits.description: Allows the user to create pockets on their body to store objects.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Laundry
fruits.description: Enables its user to cleanse people of their impure hearts and lay them on a thread. These people can then no longer move.

fruits.name: Floating Fruit
fruits.description: It enables its user to lift objects by controlling gravity. Since its user has swords for legs, he can also fly. (Although this fruit appeared in a movie, its use was demonstrated in chapter 0 of One Piece explaining Shiki's escape from Impel Down prison).

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dans-le-mille
fruits.description: Allows its user to aim at a "target" at any time and in any place with any object, whether animated or not. Its user is limited to one target per hand by simply touching it: these are memorized until the user decides to touch another.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Garment
fruits.description: Enables its user to create garments from leaves or stones.

fruits.name: Armo-Fruit
fruits.description: Enables the user to transform body parts into weapons of all kinds (revolver, cannon, saber, missile...).

fruits.name: Fruit of the whirlwind
fruits.description: Allows the user to make every part of his body rotate, enabling him to fly through the air and produce hurricanes by rotating a specific part of his body at full speed.

fruits.name: Poisse-Poisse fruit
fruits.description: the eater's body can generate mucus at will. This mucus has the following characteristics: sticky, adherent and flammable. It can therefore be used to grip objects, stick to any surface or ignite it.

fruits.name: Fruit du Joujou
fruits.description: Transforms any person into a toy by simply touching them. Transformed people no longer have control over their bodies and obey orders given to them (at least, if the user has given them any). The effects of this fruit stop the growth of its user the moment he eats it. People turned into toys are forgotten, all memories of them disappear and they are preserved from aging. If the user falls unconscious, all the people become themselves again, and the memories of those who had forgotten them resurface.

fruits.name: Fruit of Gravity
fruits.description: Allows the user to manipulate gravity around a specific location by sending gravitational forces such as boulders, meteorites or exerting force against an opponent on the ground.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Barrier
fruits.description: Enables its user to generate almost invisible barriers to deflect or block any attack. These barriers can take on a wide range of shapes (racket, stairs, etc.).

fruits.name: Fruit de la Couture
fruits.description: Allows the user to sew and unstitch anything on flat surfaces. These seams are strong enough to hold people 'hooked' to the floor.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Eye
fruits.description: Enables its user to read people's minds, transmit his own memories to someone else, and generate tears of various shapes (e.g. whale-shaped tears with enough power to pulverize wooden crates and stun a group of people). It also enables its user to observe events taking place far away, by "transmuting" his gaze into a bird's-eye view of everything happening within a given perimeter.

fruits.name: Fruit of Art
fruits.description: Enables the user to create a mist that transforms everything it touches into a work of art. Any being or object transformed into a work of art loses its original functionality.

fruits.name: Fruit de la Pelisse
fruits.description: Allows the user to appropriate the physical and mental capacities of a living being (human or animal) by wearing it in the same way as a jacket.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Paf-Paf
fruits.description: Inflates an object to the point of rupture, causing it to explode and the user to explode on contact.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Barbotage
fruits.description: Allows the user to liquefy any surface around him. This means he can swim through surfaces such as walls or even the floor.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Tonne-Tonne
fruits.description: Its user can float in the air and then land on the enemy to crush him to the ground, very quickly.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Wind Thief
fruits.description: Transforms the hard consistency of an object such as a steel cape into that of a flag. Its user can even make a sword 'soft' and then re-solidify it once it has taken on a different shape. It can also become a floating flag in its own right.

fruits.name: Fruit de la Caillasse
fruits.description: Allows its holder to melt into stone and create any shape he wishes as an exponentially larger clone of himself. It can alter and control the shape of any rock object or structure at will.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Brush
fruits.description: Allows users to generate ink from their bodies and transform the drawings created with this ink into realistic, three-dimensional objects.

fruits.name: Sourdine fruit
fruits.description: Create sound-absorbing barriers to totally cancel out the sounds produced by the system (or from an area in which it is located) and those coming from outside.

fruits.name: Fruit of Healing
fruits.description: Temporarily heals any living thing through the user's tears. It can permanently heal the wounded by taking a little vital energy from healthy people (this energy takes the form of a dandelion flower). By extension, its user can repair any object, but at the expense of its life expectancy.

fruits.name: Fruit of Souls
fruits.description: Allows you to manipulate the souls of human beings as you wish. The user can introduce a soul into an object or animal to bring it to life and humanize it, i.e. give it consciousness and the gift of speech. These beings are called 'Homies'. The user can also divide his or her own soul into fragments that live on as avatars of the fruit eater. The main role of these avatars is to harvest fragments of life from living beings and redistribute them to their owners. People with no fear of death or psychic powers are more resistant to this fruit.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Mirror
fruits.description: Allows the user to repeat the gestures of opponents and reflect their attacks. It is also possible to reflect people onto animals. Living beings can be captured in the mirrors and find themselves in a world where the mirrors are merely access points to that world. These mirrors are sources of information for the user and others currently in the mirror world, following questions that may be asked by them (e.g., communicating a person's position, etc.).

fruits.name: Fruit de la Léchouille
fruits.description: Allows the user to turn objects into sweets and then lick them off. It can also turn living creatures into sweets, killing them in the process. In addition, the user can create complex objects such as escalators with the same functions as their 'real' versions. On the other hand, sweets can melt after a certain period of time due to heat or fire, and can also be eaten.

fruits.name: Cookie Fruit
fruits.description: Allows the user to produce and manipulate cookies at will. The user can cover himself in cookies to create an alter-ego different from himself, and create a multitude of copies of the same alter-ego. Cookies can be rendered ineffective by the use of water, making them easier for enemies to eat.

fruits.name: Fruit de la Crème
fruits.description: Allows the user to produce and manipulate cream at will.

fruits.name: Butter Fruit
fruits.description: Allows the user to produce and manipulate butter at will.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Book
fruits.description: Allows the user to manipulate books at will, creating dimensions within the book's pages to trap objects or living beings. However, burning the books will free those trapped inside.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Presse-Presse
fruits.description: Allows the user to transmit and withdraw liquid from objects and living beings.

fruits.name: Fruit of Memories
fruits.description: Allows the user to extract a person's memory in film format. In this way, he can manipulate the person's memory by subtracting unwanted memories and/or inserting memories previously taken from other victims. When certain people become amnesiac, the user can make them temporarily recover their memories.

fruits.name: Glutinous Rice Fruit
fruits.description: Allows the user to generate glutinous rice at will. This allows the user to block anyone's attacks and trap them in a large quantity of glutinous rice. What's more, it has several similarities with the Gum Gum fruit, such as elongating limbs and blocking all gunfire. However, the substance dissolves after receiving a large quantity of water. It's a special Paramecia.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Lamp
fruits.description: Enables the user to summon a powerful genie from his body and attack opponents with it. This genie is armed with a halberd.

fruits.name: Fruit of Heat
fruits.description: Allows the user to heat body parts and transfer heat to objects. The heat generated by the user makes him/her more resistant to edged weapons.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Cook
fruits.description: Allows the user to transform natural objects into ingredients for subsequent consumption.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Mix
fruits.description: Allows the user to merge with other people.

fruits.name: Fruit of Exaltation
fruits.description: Allows the user to motivate people in a fight and awaken their latent power to fight.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Pousse-Pousse
fruits.description: Allows the user to manipulate and move through rock like clay. It can also be used to create tunnels.

fruits.name: Millet fruit
fruits.description: Allows the user to generate dangos and then render servile any animal that consumes them. This works on SMILES users, but not on Zoan demon fruit users.

fruits.name: Fruit of Time
fruits.description: Allows the user to travel into the future.

fruits.name: Fruit of Maturation
fruits.description: Enables the user to ripen and decompose inanimate objects. It can also age living beings.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Parchment
fruits.description: Allows the user to create and manipulate scrolls at will. Scrolls have special properties, such as the ability to store objects or attacks within them.

fruits.name: Fruit Smoke
fruits.description: the eater's body turns to smoke. He can then create smoke to catch his opponents, and can propel himself with his smoke to move faster and fly.

fruits.name: Fruit des Sables
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into sand. He can control the sand as he pleases, and can use his hands to dry out the humidity in his opponent's body, thus killing him. He can also send out sand waves, sand blades and sandstorms, sweeping away everything in his path. However, his body becomes solid again if it comes into contact with a liquid (blood, water, etc.).

fruits.name: Pyro-Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into fire. It can therefore create powerful explosions and control ambient temperatures. It can also use its fire to propel itself and move much faster. However, fire is no match for magma.

fruits.name: Fulguro-Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into lightning. It can therefore move at lightning speed and strike anything except non-conductive elements such as rubber. He can create powerful thunderstorms or spheres of lightning. By combining Haki with its lightning, its user can hear things from over 1 kilometer away. He can also revive himself if he falls unconscious.

fruits.name: Frost Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into ice. It can freeze anything and almost anyone, launching super-powerful waves of icy air that can freeze everything in their path, and is immune to temperature differentials when it intensifies the ambient cold. Its user can neutralize opponents in a flash, or even freeze a vast expanse of water for 1 week.

fruits.name: Fruit of Darkness
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into darkness. It becomes capable of altering gravity so as to attract and absorb just about anything in a 'black hole' and then release it. It can also cancel the powers of other demon fruit users when it touches them. Moreover, it is the only Logia that cannot avoid physical blows, so its user becomes highly sensitive to pain. It can also absorb the power of its owner's demon fruit, as Marshall D. Teach will do with Whitebeard.

fruits.name: Luminescent Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into light. He can then move and strike almost anyone quickly. It can also move at the speed of light, emit explosive rays of light, blind enemies and create weapons made of light (swords, spears, etc.).

fruits.name: Magma Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into lava. It can then melt anything and almost anyone. It can also create giant lava hands which, after being launched into the atmosphere, bring volcanic particles down to earth, causing great damage. Fire is powerless against magma.

fruits.name: Fruit du Marais
fruits.description: the body of the eater turns to mud and becomes a living swamp. He can create bottomless swamps to prevent his victims from escaping: the more his victims struggle, the deeper they sink. Thanks to this principle, he can enclose them in his body while retaining his original size. It also allows him to keep weapons inside his body, such as a machine gun or a scythe, and to draw them out for use when needed.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Gas
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into gas. As a result, his body can change shape at will. It can float high above the ground and slip through any narrow or otherwise inaccessible passage. It seems to be immune to certain poisons, can create others such as hallucinogenic gases and can even purify intoxicated air. He can suffocate his victims by depriving them of oxygen. It can also create an explosive gas and spit a beam capable of melting metal.

fruits.name: Fruit du Flocon
fruits.description: the body of the eater turns to snow. It can create a violent blizzard, solid snow barriers or even igloos. He can also use his body to chill opponents, putting them in a state of stasis, for example. He can also transform himself into a snow "monster", endowing himself with a pair of snow wings and transforming these parts into ice as sharp and solid as steel. It can also shape snow creatures (e.g. snow rabbits) and use them as projectiles. Finally, the user can use his power to manipulate snow spikes as sabers.

fruits.name: Fruit du Bovin, Bison version
fruits.description: Whoever eats it becomes half buffalo. Speed, reflexes and strength are greatly enhanced.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Human
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half-human. As the user was originally a reindeer, he acquired an intelligence that enabled him to acquire a vast amount of knowledge. Before the ellipse, Chopper had to take a Rumble-Ball to get more transformations for 3 minutes1 (if after 3 minutes he took another Rumble-Ball, he no longer controlled his transformations, and if he took a 3rd Rumble-Ball, he became a gigantic but unconscious monster, destroying enemies and allies alike). After the ellipse, he masters all transformations perfectly, and when he takes a Rumble-Ball he becomes the gigantic monster, but in control of himself.

fruits.name: Fruit du Volatile, Falcon version
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half hawk. This power gives him keen eyesight, surprising speed and the ability to fly.

fruits.name: Digging Fruit
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half-mole. It can dig gigantic galleries in almost any material.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Canid, Basset version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi moderu Dakkusufunto
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half basset hound. Given that its user is a firearm, this has turned it into a half-gun, half-dog creature.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Canidae, Jackal version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi moderu Jakkaru
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half jackal. Its agility in hybrid form is far superior to the average.

fruits.name: Horse Fruit
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half-horse. Since its user is a bird, this has turned him into a half-bird, half-horse creature. This transforms him into a kind of pegasus.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Feline, Leopard version
fruits.romanized: Neko Neko no Mi moderu: Hyō
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half leopard. His strength and speed increase impressively, and with the help of Rokushiki techniques, he can take on a second, smaller and more agile hybrid form.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Pachyderm
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half-elephant. Given that its user is a sword, this has turned it into a half-sword, half-elephant being. Having acquired consciousness and thus a certain intelligence, it can have phenomenal reach.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Canid, Wolf version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi moderu: Ōkami
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half-wolf. Its strength and speed are greater in hybrid form.

fruits.name: Fruit du Bovin, Giraffe version
fruits.romanized: Ushi Ushi no Mi moderu Kirin
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes half giraffe. His kicks and nose strikes are much more powerful (especially with the Rokushiki Shigan).

fruits.name: Fruit of the Reptile, Anaconda version
fruits.romanized: Hebi Hebi no Mi moderu: Anakonda
fruits.description: allows its user to transform himself into an anaconda as he pleases: the user can turn his hair into steel-hard snakes.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Reptile, Cobra Royal version
fruits.romanized: Hebi Hebi no Mi moderu: Kingu Kobura
fruits.description: allows the user to transform himself into a cobra as he pleases: he can cast deadly poison, can transform his hair into a snake and is impervious to fire.

fruits.name: Turtle Fruit
fruits.description: whoever eats it can transform into a turtle with an indestructible shell. As strong as diamond, it protects its user from firearms and collapsing buildings, among other hazards.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Egg
fruits.description: allows the user to transform his body composition into an egg. Each time it is seriously injured, the user regenerates into a more and more accomplished form of chicken, exponentially increasing its physical capacities.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Salamander, Axolotl version
fruits.romanized: Sara Sara no Mi moderu: Ahorōtoru
fruits.description: Those who eat it can transform into an axolotl, the user being an enormous living gelatinous mass made of a flammable product, it can move much faster to charge its victims and subdivide into a multitude of smaller creatures like the original version.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Insect, Scarab-Rhinoceros version
fruits.romanized: Mushi Mushi no Mi, Moderu Kabutomushi
fruits.description: whoever eats it can transform into a rhinoceros beetle. It enables the user to fly.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Insect, Wasp version
fruits.romanized: Mushi Mushi no Mi, Moderu Suzumebachi
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a wasp. It enables the user to fly.

fruits.name: Fruit du Volatile, Albatross version
fruits.romanized: Tori Tori no Mi Moderu Arubatorosu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into an albatross.

fruits.name: Canid Fruit, Tanuki version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi Moderu Bake-danuki
fruits.description: whoever eats it can transform into a tanuki.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dinosaur, Allosaurus version
fruits.romanized: Ryū Ryū no Mi Moderu Arosaurusu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into an allosaurus.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Pachyderm, Mammoth version
fruits.romanized: Zō Zō no Mi, moderu Manmosu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a mammoth. It increases the strength and length of its owner in an exceptional way. The hardness of its skin also gives it a certain resistance to physical attack.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dinosaur, Spinosaurus version
fruits.romanized: Ryū Ryū no Mi Moderu Supinosaurusu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a spinosaurus.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dinosaur, Pteranodon version
fruits.romanized: Ryū Ryū no Mi Kodai-shu Moderu Puteranodon
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a pteranodon.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dinosaur, Brachiosaurus version
fruits.romanized: Ryū Ryū no Mi Moderu Burakiosaurusu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a brachiosaurus.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dinosaur, Pachycephalosaurus version
fruits.romanized: Ryū Ryū no Mi Moderu Pakikefarosaurusu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a pachycephalosaurus.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dinosaur, Triceratops version
fruits.romanized: Ryū Ryū no Mi Moderu Torikeratopusu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a triceratops.

fruits.name: Spider fruit, Rosamygale grauvogeli version
fruits.romanized: Kumo Kumo no Mi Moderu Rosamigare Guraubogerī
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a rosamygale grauvogeli.

fruits.name: Fruit du Félin, saber-toothed tiger version
fruits.romanized: Neko Neko no Mi Moderu Sāberutaigā
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a saber-toothed tiger.

fruits.name: Fruit du Félin, saber-toothed tiger version
fruits.romanized: Tori Tori no Mi, Moderu Fenikkusu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a phoenix. It can regenerate and heal the wounds of other living beings.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Human, Buddha version
fruits.romanized: Hito Hito no Mi moderu Daibutsu
fruits.description: whoever eats it can transform into an imposing Daibutsu, considerably increasing his physical strength. It can generate shockwaves.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Fish, Azure Dragon version
fruits.romanized: Uo Uo no Mi, Moderu Seiryū
fruits.description: whoever eats it can transform into an azure dragon.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Canidae, Nine-tailed Fox version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi, Moderu Kyūbi no Kitsune
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a nine-tailed fox.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Reptile, eight-headed dragon version
fruits.romanized: Hebi Hebi no Mi moderu Yamata no Orochi
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into an eight-headed dragon.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Human, Onyudo version
fruits.romanized: Hito Hito no Mi, Moderu: Ōnyūdō
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into an Onyudo

fruits.name: Fruit of the Canid, Divine Wolf version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi Moderu Ōkuchi no Makami
fruits.description: whoever eats it can turn into a divine wolf.

fruits.name: Sheep SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a sheep.

fruits.name: Bat SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a bat.

fruits.name: SMILE de gazelle
fruits.description: it transforms you into a gazelle.

fruits.name: Mouse SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms into a mouse.

fruits.name: Lion SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a lion.

fruits.name: Horse SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a horse.

fruits.name: SMILE of snake
fruits.description: it transforms you into a snake.

fruits.name: Rabbit SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a rabbit.

fruits.name: Hippopotamus SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a hippopotamus.

fruits.name: SMILE from alpaca
fruits.description: it transforms into an alpaca.

fruits.name: SMILE of the elephant
fruits.description: it transforms you into an elephant.

fruits.name: SMILE of the scorpion
fruits.description: it transforms you into a scorpion.

fruits.name: Monkey SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a monkey.

fruits.name: Armadillo SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into an armadillo.

fruits.name: Ostrich SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into an ostrich.

fruits.name: Flying Squirrel SMILE

fruits.description: it transforms you into a white snake.

fruits.name: Gorilla SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a gorilla

fruits.name: SMILE du coq
fruits.description: it transforms you into a rooster

fruits.name: Giraffe SMILE
fruits.description: transforms into a giraffe

fruits.name: Rattlesnake SMILE
fruits.description: transforms into a rattlesnake

fruits.name: Heterodon SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms into a heterodon

fruits.name: Caiman SMILE
fruits.description: it transforms you into a caiman

fruits.name: Pug SMILE
fruits.description: transforms into a pug

fruits.name: Fruit of the Vocalise
fruits.description: the person who has eaten this fruit uses sound beams converted into lasers to destroy everything in his path.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Whisper
fruits.description: This fruit enables the user to understand the heart of an animal or, in other words, to speak to animals. The user cannot control the animal's will.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Slash-Slash
fruits.description: whoever has eaten this fruit can create blades of air as sharp as a sword.

fruits.name: Unbreakable Fruit
fruits.description: whoever eats it becomes as hard as rock, and can increase the heat of certain body parts so that his opponent burns himself by touching them.

fruits.name: Fruit of Sleep
fruits.description: This fruit can put anyone to sleep via hypnosis. The user can thus penetrate the memory of the sleeping person to inflict damage such as memory loss or nightmares.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Dwarf
fruits.description: allows its user to shrink at will.

fruits.name: Fruit of Heat
fruits.description: The user can control his body heat and raise it to over 10,000 degrees, enabling him to melt anything. This makes him insensitive to the cold.

fruits.name: Chamquipue fruit
fruits.description: the person eating the fruit can create poisonous spores. These spores can take various forms (laser beams, clones, etc.). Of course, the user is immune to poison, but his power is vulnerable to fire.

fruits.name: Fruit du Filet
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to eat materials of any type (fire, metal...) and create nets with the properties of the ingested substance. This fruit is ideal for capturing enemies.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Copy
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to copy the abilities of others by touching and taking a blow from an opponent.

fruits.name: Fluffy Fruit
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to accelerate the growth rate of plants and control them at will. Its user can use it mainly to trap or attack enemies with vines, but also to protect himself from enemy attacks. However, it can only grow plants in environments where vegetation is present.

fruits.name: Fruit Jeune-Jeune
fruits.description: This fruit allows its holder to rejuvenate people and return objects to their state 12 years ago (for example, volcanic rocks will return to their lava state). This power is manifested by the creation of a pink aura with which the user must touch the target to activate it. The more the object or person is touched by this power, the younger it becomes. If the number of touches exceeds the age of the person or object touched (minus 12 years for each touch), he/she disappears permanently.

fruits.name: Fruit du Fourneau
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to produce and melt any structure in silver. It can also create weapons and transform living beings into silver statues.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Trainer
fruits.description: This fruit can be used to produce a slimy green material and wrap it around the neck of any living creature, controlling it by the sound of its voice. The necklace is indestructible. However, you can protect yourself from its effects by plugging your ears. The user can also use its power on himself to increase his physical capacities and obey his own orders so as to carry them out effectively.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Link
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to transform those he touches into other individuals, copying their appearance, abilities and strength. However, the user cannot transform himself.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Plus-Plus
fruits.description: It enables the user to increase the speed, size or other capabilities of any object he touches by up to 100 times. By extension, the user can increase his own abilities.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Cube
fruits.description: It enables its user to transform everything he touches into cubes (soil, ships, humans) and control them. When assembled, these cubes can form more complex structures.

fruits.name: Fruit of Magic
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to use magical techniques resembling the tricks performed by magicians in shows.

fruits.name: Nitro-Fruit
fruits.description: This fruit confers on its user the properties of nitroglycerine: each time the hands are clapped, an explosion is produced.

fruits.name: Fruit of love
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to manipulate anyone by making them fall in love. He does this by sending a beam of light onto his victims via the wings of his peacock outfit.

fruits.name: Passe-Muraille fruit
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to pass through solid objects to escape or pass through walls.

fruits.name: Tchou-Tchou fruit
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to transform his hands and feet into wheels. The user thus becomes a 'man-wagon'.

fruits.name: Fruit of Chains
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to produce and control chains at will.

fruits.name: Fruit of Camouflage
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to produce and create paint to camouflage people or objects.

fruits.name: Fruit of Gold
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to manipulate gold at will. He can transform solid objects into gold and melt them as well. He can coat his body in gold, transforming himself into a giant solid gold golem. He can also make buildings out of gold and control them.

fruits.name: Fruit of Luck
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to steal luck from those he touches and use it for himself.

fruits.name: Fruit of Heat Waves
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to generate waves of heat.

fruits.name: Fruit of Things
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to clone anything, such as the user himself, other people or objects.

fruits.name: Fruit of Vision
fruits.description: This fruit enables him to create temporary illusions in the shape of the desired person.

fruits.name: Fruit of Shooting
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to transform anything into a firearm.

fruits.name: Fruit du Potelé
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to add fat to the body of opponents in order to immobilize them.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Burner
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to transform jealousy into heat and flames.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Deliverer
fruits.description: This fruit allows its user to send an object to any target within sight of the user.

fruits.name: Fruit of Dissolution
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to dissolve anything into liquid, including himself, by shooting rays into his opponents' eyes.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Bomb
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to turn anything into a bomb.

fruits.name: Fruit de la Ferraille
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to manipulate and combine objects such as iron and weapons.

fruits.name: Fruit of Necromancy
fruits.description: This fruit enables its user to reproduce the appearance of the deceased.

fruits.name: Fruit of Dissolution
fruits.description: the body of the eater turns to liquid.

fruits.name: Paper Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into pieces of paper. This makes it easy to dodge attacks and even to produce maps and books. Highly effective against electricity, but vulnerable to fire.

fruits.name: Candy Fruit
fruits.description: the body of the eater is transformed into syrup. It can also contain any solid mass passing through it (swords, fists, feet, etc.). However, it is vulnerable if hit by a mealy substance.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Volatile, Eagle version
fruits.romanized: Tori Tori no Mi moderu Washi
fruits.description: Very similar to the Falcon version of Fruit du Volatile

fruits.name: Fruit du Bovin, Lama version
fruits.romanized: Ushi Ushi no Mi moderu Lama
fruits.description: Transforms into a llama

fruits.name: Fruit du Canidé, Raccoon version
fruits.romanized: Inu Inu no Mi Moderu Bake-danuki
fruits.description: Transforms into a Tanuki, a Japanese mythological creature.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Bat, Vampire version
fruits.romanized: Batto Batto no Mi Moderu Banpaia
fruits.description: Allows its user to transform into a vampire, a legendary horrific creature. This fruit absorbs people's vitality, causing them to age.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Volatile, Naked version
fruits.romanized: Tori Tori no Mi, Moderu Nue
fruits.description: Enables its user to transform into a nude.

fruits.name: Hito Hito no Mi, Nika model
fruits.romanized: Hito Hito no Mi, Moderu: Nika
fruits.description: Hito Hito no Mi, Nika model, is a Mythical Zoan Demon Fruit that enables its user to transform into Nika, the "God of the Sun".

fruits.name: Fruit du Ciboulot
fruits.description: Nomi Nomi no Mi is a Paramecia-type Demon Fruit that allows the brain of its eater to grow indefinitely as it ingests new knowledge, transforming the eater into a Brain-Man.

fruits.name: Fruit of strength
fruits.description: It's a fruit that allows the eater to acquire Herculean strength.

fruits.name: Fruit of teleportation
fruits.description: It's a demon fruit that allows the eater to teleport himself and anything else from one place to another.

fruits.name: Island fruit
fruits.description: It's a demon fruit that allows its user to become one with an entire island, thus becoming an Island Man.

fruits.name: The fruit of gigantism
fruits.description: It's a demon fruit that allows its user to increase his size, making him a Gigantified Man.

fruits.name: Fruit of the Gobbledygook
fruits.description: It's a demon fruit that allows its user to control alcohol, making him a Man-Alcohol.

fruits.name: Fruit of the disease
fruits.description: It's a demon fruit that allows the eater to create any form of contagious, virulent disease.

fruits.name: Horse fruit, Pegasus model
fruits.romanized: Uma Uma no Mi, modèle Pégase
fruits.description: This demon fruit allows the user to transform into a flying winged horse or a hybrid flying winged horse.

fruits.name: Phoenix Fruit
fruits.description: It transforms into a Phoenix or a hybrid form

fruits.name: Fruit
fruits.description: Fruit

fruits.name: Fruit of age
fruits.description:
age manipulation
aging / rejuvenation
temporary biological alteration

fruits.name: Bat-fruit / vampire (fruit-bat model)
fruits.description: A Zoan-type fruit that transforms its user into a vampiric creature, specializing in infiltration and stealth attacks rather than brute force.

fruits.name: Clone of the fruit of the slasher
fruits.description: Clone of the fruit of the slasher

fruits.name: Clone of the Barbotage fruit

crew_joins.name: Monkey D. Luffy
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Founder — the crew begins when he sets out from Foosha Village, Chapter 1 / Episode 1 (Romance Dawn). NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Roronoa Zoro
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Agrees to sail with Luffy after the Morgan fight, Chapter 6 / Episode 3 (Romance Dawn). NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Usopp
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Joins at the end of Syrup Village, Chapter 41 / Episode 18. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga. (Note: he also departs the crew during Water 7 and rejoins at Ch 438 — this file records the first join only; a departures table is future work.) (3rd by join chapter, behind Nami in the traditional roster count — see Nami's ORDER NOTE.)

crew_joins.name: Sanji
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Leaves the Baratie to join, Chapter 68 / Episode 30. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Nami
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. AMBIGUOUS BY DESIGN — Nami first 'joins' around Chapter 8 (Orange Town) as a thief working an angle, then leaves, robs the crew, and only truly joins after Arlong Park. This row uses the Arlong Park figure (Ch 95 / Ep 44) because that is the join the story treats as real. A reader at Chapter 50 will see Nami on the ship in the anime and NOT in this dataset; that is a deliberate call, not a bug. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION and a decision on which join the atlas should honour. ORDER NOTE: because this row uses the Arlong Park join (ch 95) rather than the Orange Town one (ch 8), Nami is the 5th Straw Hat by join chapter, not the 3rd the fandom counts. `order` here means join sequence, not roster position. If Shawn decides the atlas should honour the ch 8 join, this row and the order of Usopp and Sanji all move.

crew_joins.name: Tony Tony Chopper
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Joins leaving Drum Island, Chapter 153 / Episode 91. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Nico Robin
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Invites herself aboard at the end of Arabasta, Chapter 218 / Episode 130. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Franky
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Joins after Enies Lobby / the Thousand Sunny reveal, Chapter 437 / Episode 321. His DEBUT is ~Chapter 329 — over 100 chapters earlier. Classic debut-vs-join gap. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Brook
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. Joins during Thriller Bark, Chapter 489 / Episode 381. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.

crew_joins.name: Jinbe
crew_joins.source_ref: Hand-authored. THE LANDMINE. Jinbe DEBUTS at Chapter 528 / Episode 430 and formally JOINS at Chapter 976 / Episode 977, during Wano. The gap is 547 EPISODES. Every wiki has a Debut field and it is not this number. scripts/check_canon.py has a dedicated jinbe_test asserting join_episode > 900 — if that test ever fires, someone scraped a Debut field into a join field. NEEDS HUMAN VERIFICATION against the manga.
